name: Raisin-Sausage Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the toasted bread cubes and raisins in a large bowl.
2. Brown the pork sausage in a skillet, stirring to prevent clumps. Once cooked, pour off most of the fat.
3. Add the chopped celery and onion to the skillet and cook until tender.
4. Stir in the brown sugar, grated lemon peel, and salt.
5. Pour the mixture over the bread and raisins, then mix lightly.
6. This stuffing will yield enough for a 12-pound turkey.
